name: Block Collide
short_description: Block collide is a relaxing puzzle game with a minimalistic art style. Move the blocks in the right order so they won’t collide with each other.
detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in the soothing world of Block Collide, a relaxing and visually minimalist puzzle game designed to challenge your brain without overwhelming you. With 50 uniquely crafted puzzles, each offering varying levels of difficulty, Block Collide keeps gameplay fresh and rewarding as you solve puzzles by moving cubes to their goals—all while making sure they don’t collide.

As you progress, new mechanics are introduced, such as cubes that move in pairs, pause nodes that freeze movements, and locks that create new strategic obstacles. Every puzzle is a test of timing and order, ensuring no two levels feel the same. The calming atmospheric soundtrack, composed specifically for the game, enhances the experience and helps keep you relaxed as you solve the increasingly tricky puzzles.

Block Collide offers full flexibility in controls—whether you prefer using the mouse, keyboard, or gamepad, the choice is yours. Completing each level unlocks an achievement, giving you a satisfying sense of progress.

Key Features:

  • 50 Puzzles: Solve a range of puzzles, from easy to challenging, as you navigate cubes toward their goals without colliding.

  • Minimalist Art Style: Enjoy a clean and simple visual experience designed to help you focus on the puzzle-solving.

  • Relaxing Atmosphere: Accompanied by a custom-composed ambient soundtrack to enhance relaxation and concentration.

  • Innovative Mechanics: Encounter new gameplay elements such as paired cubes, pause nodes, and locks to keep the puzzles engaging.

  • Flexible Controls: Play how you want—use the mouse, keyboard, or gamepad for an intuitive experience.

  • Achievements: Unlock an achievement for every puzzle you complete, motivating you to keep solving.

Whether you're looking for a casual puzzle to relax with or a rewarding mental challenge, Block Collide delivers a serene yet engaging gameplay experience.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
